articles.title: The Meta hack shows thereвҖҷs more to AI security than Mythos
articles.description: On June 5, 404 Media reported that attackers had been using MetaвҖҷs AI customer support agent to steal Instagram accounts. Their approach was simple: They asked the agent to link the accounts to email addresses that they controlled, and the agent complied. One attacker broke into the dormant Obama Wh
articles.content: On June 5, 404 Media reported that attackers had been using MetaвҖҷs AI customer support agent to steal Instagram accounts. Their approach was simple: They asked the agent to link the accounts to email addresses that they controlled, and the agent complied. One attacker broke into the dormant Obama White House account and made pro-Iran posts; others took over accounts with valuable, single-word handles, possibly in order to sell them. AI cybersecurity concerns are nothing new. Since Anthropic anno
articles.author: Grace Huckins

articles.title: Reid Hoffman is leaving MicrosoftвҖҷs board to go вҖҳfounder modeвҖҷ with  startup Manus
articles.description: After a very profitable decade on Microsoft's board, Reid Hoffman is stepping down to focus on his AI drug discovery startup Manus.
articles.content: After a very profitable decade on Microsoft's board, Reid Hoffman is stepping down to focus on his AI drug discovery startup Manus.

articles.title: Are AI chatbots making us lose control of our brains?
articles.description: This week IвҖҷve been at SXSW London. ThereвҖҷs been music, film, and a lotвҖ”and I mean a lotвҖ”of talk about AI. I also had the opportunity to sit down with Gloria Mark, a psychologist at the University of California, Irvine, who has spent the last 30 years studying how people interact with digital techno
articles.content: This week IвҖҷve been at SXSW London . ThereвҖҷs been music, film, and a lotвҖ”and I mean a lot вҖ”of talk about AI. I also had the opportunity to sit down with Gloria Mark, a psychologist at the University of California, Irvine, who has spent the last 30 years studying how people interact with digital technologies. Early in her career, the biggest concerns were the potential impacts of internet and email use on our brains. We may laugh those concerns off today, but itвҖҷs true that as the technologies be
articles.author: Jessica Hamzelou

articles.title: Published Throughline to npm: A hook to offload Claude Code tool I/O to SQLite
articles.description: I have published a hook plugin for Claude Code called Throughline to npm. What it does In a Claude Code session, the majority of the context is filled with the remnants of "tool I/O." The contents of read files, grep results, and Bash outputвҖ”data that served its purpose the moment the AI read it, ma
articles.content: I have published a hook plugin for Claude Code called Throughline to npm. What it does In a Claude Code session, the majority of the context is filled with the remnants of "tool I/O." The contents of read files, grep results, and Bash outputвҖ”data that served its purpose the moment the AI read it, made a decision, and moved on. However, it stays in the context until the end, consuming tokens. Throughline manages the conversation in three layers. Layer Content Context Injection L2 Conversation bod
articles.author: QuoLu

articles.title: Control Resonant is a sequel вҖ” and also a starting point
articles.description: Chronologically, Control Resonant is a sequel to 2019's Control. But in most other ways, the games aren't directly connected. To developer Remedy, they're more like two sides of the same coin. When Resonant was first revealed last year, creative director Mikael Kasurinen said you can play the games
articles.content: Chronologically, Control Resonant is a sequel to 2019's Control . But in most other ways, the games aren't directly connected. To developer Remedy, they're more like two sides of the same coin. When Resonant was first revealed last year, creative director Mikael Kasurinen said you can play the games in any order . The world of Control is reality-bending in lots of ways, but the general linear progression of time isn't really one of them - how would someone start with the sequel? It didn't click
articles.author: Kallie Plagge

articles.title: The saga of the International Space Station air leak took a worrying turn Friday
articles.description: "We look forward to working with Roscosmos on a collaborative approach to address the leaks."
articles.content: Five of the seven crew members on the International Space Station briefly sought refuge inside a SpaceX return capsule Friday morning as two Russian cosmonauts worked on an air leak on the other end of the complex. NASA ordered US astronauts Jessica Meir and Jack Hathaway, French astronaut Sophie Adenot, and Russian cosmonaut Andrey Fedyaev into SpaceX's Crew Dragon Freedom spacecraft around 9 am EST (14:00 UTC) on Friday. The foursome launched aboard the SpaceX crew capsule on the Crew-12 missi
articles.author: Stephen Clark

articles.title: GitHub Universe is back: All together now, in the agentic era
articles.description: GitHub Universe is back: returning to the historic Fort Mason Center in San Francisco on October 28вҖ“29, 2026. The post GitHub Universe is back: All together now, in the agentic era appeared first on The GitHub Blog .
articles.content: If you’ve been following all the AI agent conversations and wondering what’s useful versus what’s just noise, you’re not alone. There are ideas everywhere. What’s challenging is finding the time and a practical path from cool demos to workflows that make your day easier. GitHub Universe bridges that gap. Universe is our flagship event for developers and the teams who support them—builders, maintainers, security practitioners, technical leaders, and partners&md
articles.author: Natalie Guevara

articles.title: Putin says there is 'no point' meeting Zelensky over ending Ukraine war
articles.description: The Russian president's refusal comes after his Ukrainian counterpart wrote an open letter calling for face-to-face talks.

articles.title: FreeUltraCode: An AI Coding Tool with 20+ Free LLM Channels
articles.description: I've been a game developer for over a decade вҖ” Unity C#, Unreal C++, a few custom engines. Last year I started using Claude Code and Codex CLI heavily. Not for "write me a sorting function" stuff. I'm talking about having it read an entire rendering pipeline, modify logic across a dozen files, add p
articles.content: I've been a game developer for over a decade вҖ” Unity C#, Unreal C++, a few custom engines. Last year I started using Claude Code and Codex CLI heavily. Not for "write me a sorting function" stuff. I'm talking about having it read an entire rendering pipeline, modify logic across a dozen files, add physics debug tooling, fix multi-threaded race conditions. Claude Code is legit. It reads the project structure first, traces the call graph, then makes changes. Runs the build, catches errors, debugs
articles.author: wei feng

articles.content: This is today’s edition of The Download , our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. The Meta hack shows thereвҖҷs more to AI security than Mythos On Monday, reports emerged that attackers had used MetaвҖҷs AI customer support agent to steal Instagram accounts. Their approach was simple: they asked the agent to link the accounts to email addresses they controlled, and it complied. Since Anthropic announced that its Mythos model was to

articles.title: Two Doors Into the Same Room
articles.description: The Destruction Side: Phrack Magazine Phrack is a selfвҖ‘published hacker zine founded in 1985, distributed via dialвҖ‘up bulletin board systems (BBS) rather than mainstream media. Its name combines "phreak" (phone phreaking) and "hack," reflecting its content. Early Phrack issues were gritty compilatio
articles.content: The Destruction Side: Phrack Magazine Phrack is a selfвҖ‘published hacker zine founded in 1985, distributed via dialвҖ‘up bulletin board systems (BBS) rather than mainstream media. Its name combines "phreak" (phone phreaking) and "hack," reflecting its content. Early Phrack issues were gritty compilations of phoneвҖ‘phreaking techniques, war stories, and even howвҖ‘to bomb recipes knowledge freely shared among curious technologists. Crucially, Phrack emphasized that understanding systems is not malice:
articles.author: GnomeMan4201

articles.title: How a USB-connected speaker can infect a PC without ever being touched
articles.description: Seller of the Sound Blaster Katana V2X doesn't consider the behavior a vulnerability.
articles.content: Operating system makers take many steps to prevent their wares from accepting commands from remote devices. The safeguards, designed to thwart malicious attacks, typically require hackers to jump through all kinds of hoops to bypass the measures. But what if remote code execution were as simple as being within Bluetooth range of a speaker connected to the targeted device? It turns out it can, at least when the speaker is a Sound Blaster Katana V2X sold by Singapore-based Creative Technologies. T
articles.author: Dan Goodin

articles.title: More than a decade later, the team behind N++ is back with a multiplayer sequel
articles.description: Back in 2015, the two-person studio Metanet released N++, a brutally hard 2D platformer that was a decade in the making, building off of previous releases dating back to the freeware Flash title N. At the time, cofounder Raigan Burns issued some famous last words: "We hope it's not another 10 years
articles.content: Back in 2015, the two-person studio Metanet released N++ , a brutally hard 2D platformer that was a decade in the making, building off of previous releases dating back to the freeware Flash title N . At the time, cofounder Raigan Burns issued some famous last words : "We hope it's not another 10 years before we come up with a game." But now here we are, more than a decade later, and N is getting another sequel. And this time the focus is on multiplayer. The new game is called, absurdly, N Plus I
articles.author: Andrew Webster

articles.title: Small modular nuclear reactor reaches criticality in first test
articles.description: The reactor, from a startup called Antares, isn't ready to generate power yet.
articles.content: Just over a year ago, the Trump Administration issued an executive order meant to accelerate the development of nuclear power in the US. While an entire startup ecosystem has developed around the use of differentвҖ”and typically smallerвҖ”reactor designs, only one of them has been fully licensed so far, and there are no plans to actually build any instances of that design. The executive order directed the Department of Energy to have three different reactor designs reach criticality in a bit over a
articles.author: John Timmer

articles.title: Baby botulism outbreak: FDA still doesn't know causeвҖ”or how to prevent it
articles.description: In the end, the three companies involved all point the finger at each other.
articles.content: The Food and Drug Administration this week posted what critics call an "underwhelming" epilogue to the devastating outbreak of botulism in babies , which was linked to spore-contaminated formula made by ByHeart . Despite clear tracking of the contamination, the regulator still doesn't know how the bacteria arrived in the formulaвҖ”or how to prevent it from happening again. "The FDA's investigation into the root cause is ongoing with a focus on ingredients," the agency reported. In the void, three
articles.author: Beth Mole

articles.description: Who's afraid of the next GTA? Based on the last few days of Summer Game Fest, just about everyone. Grand Theft Auto VI hasn't been present at any of the keynote events, but its presence was felt every time a release date was announced. The month of November, when GTA VI launches, is virtually empty.
articles.content: Who's afraid of the next GTA ? Based on the last few days of Summer Game Fest, just about everyone. Grand Theft Auto VI hasn't been present at any of the keynote events, but its presence was felt every time a release date was announced. The month of November, when GTA VI launches, is virtually empty. The rest of the fall, meanwhile, is absolutely packed. It started at Sony's State of Play showcase on Tuesday. Even before that show, we knew that Wolverine , the next big PlayStation exclusive , wo
